title: Tool Integration Schema
description: Schema for rickshaw.json files inside tool subprojects.  Defines the tool's controller-side post-processing script and collector configuration including deployment constraints, lifecycle scripts, and file transfers.

rickshaw-tool.description: Metadata block containing the schema version for this rickshaw.json tool file format.

version.description: The schema version this file conforms to.  Currently must be '2020.03.18'.

tool.description: The tool name, used to identify this tool throughout the system.  Must match the tool's subproject directory name.

controller.description: Defines scripts that run on the controller for post-processing tool data after collection completes.

post-script.description: Script that runs on the controller after tool data has been collected and transferred back from the engines.  Typically handles post-processing, data conversion, or metric extraction.

collector.description: Defines the tool's data collection configuration including lifecycle scripts, file transfers, and deployment constraints that control where the tool runs.

files-from-controller.description: Files to copy from the controller to the collector engine before collection begins.

items.description: A file transfer specification defining source and destination paths.

src.description: Source path on the controller where the file is located.

dest.description: Destination path in the collector engine where the file will be placed.

required.description: Whether this file must exist on the controller.  If true and the file is missing, execution fails.  If false, the file is skipped if absent.

blacklist.description: A list of endpoint and collector-type combinations where this tool must NOT run.  If a collector matches any blacklist entry, the tool will not be deployed there.

items.description: A blacklist entry specifying an endpoint type and the collector types that should be excluded.

endpoint.description: The endpoint type this blacklist entry applies to.

collector-types.description: The collector types within the specified endpoint where this tool must not run.

items.description: A collector type that identifies the role or function of the collection node.

whitelist.description: A list of endpoint and collector-type combinations where this tool MUST run.  If a whitelist is specified, the tool will only be deployed to collectors that match at least one whitelist entry.

items.description: A whitelist entry specifying an endpoint type and the collector types where this tool should run.

endpoint.description: The endpoint type this whitelist entry applies to.

collector-types.description: The collector types within the specified endpoint where this tool must run.

items.description: A collector type that identifies the role or function of the collection node.

start.description: The script that launches data collection in the background on the collector engine.

stop.description: The script that terminates data collection on the collector engine and prepares the collected data for transfer back to the controller.
